response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a broad engineering career spanning 17+ years with genuine entrepreneurial experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but falls meaningfully short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) profile. The role demands recognized, deep AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, director-level strategic advisory capability, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field. Bogdan's AI work is limited to his current role (started April 2025) involving MCP tooling, with no prior history of shipping AI products at scale, no evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on cloud and AI adoption, and no graduate-level AI credentials.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on software engineering across diverse stacks and domains, satisfying the minimum experience threshold
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of Northwind Labs plus sustained community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source contributions
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, demonstrating an active pivot toward the AI tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (current role only, since April 2025); no prior history of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms
No evidence of director-level IC capabilities such as advising strategic customers, shaping organizational AI strategy, or influencing cross-company technical direction at executive level
No advanced degree in AI or a related field; education comprises two bachelor's degrees, one of which is in fine arts and visual media

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
